scripts.dev: DEMO=true pnpm run -F web -F server dev
scripts.generate:images: npx tsx playwright/screenshots.ts && pnpm run add-borders && pnpm run png-to-gif
scripts.add-borders: for img in playwright/step1-main.png playwright/step1a-main.png playwright/step2-sidebar.png playwright/step3-settings.png; do convert "$img" -bordercolor black -border 4 "$img"; done
scripts.png-to-gif: convert -bordercolor black -border 4 -delay 300 -loop 0 playwright/step1-main.png playwright/step1a-main.png playwright/step2-sidebar.png playwright/step3-settings.png playwright/checked-demo.gif
